  • public interface IADAS

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DCL_UPDATE_AUTHORIZED_TIME
      DCL(Data Closed-Loop) Vehicle data collection time update DCL(Data Closed-Loop)数据闭环，车辆数据采集更新时间 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type [0]代表年(四位，如2024) [1]代表月（最多两位，不补0） [2]代表日（最多两位，不补0） deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-30 16:19:47
      static int DPS_UPDATE_AUTHORIZED_TIME
      DPS start time setting (Driver Performance Support) DPS设置开始时间 (驾驶员状态监测)，原AdaptAPI为IADAS#SETTING_FUNC_DPS_UPDATE_AUTHORIZED_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type [0]代表年(四位，如2024) [1]代表月（最多两位，不补0） [2]代表日（最多两位，不补0） deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-30 15:41:25
